mapper.insert:
insert into source_chapters (project_id, chapter_no, title, raw_text, clean_text, summary) values
(#{chapter.projectId}, #{chapter.chapterNo}, #{chapter.title}, #{chapter.rawText}, #{chapter.cleanText}, #{chapter.summary})
mapper.select: select id, project_id, chapter_no, title, raw_text, clean_text, summary, created_at from source_chapters where project_id = #{projectId} order by chapter_no asc
